scope.exact_claim: The three displayed integer center cycles expand to the signed shortcut-Collatz cycles through -1, -5, and -17.  At every stored level, each exact deviation product strictly exceeds its certified rational lower edge-weight product, and each of the three eight-level surplus sequences is strictly decreasing.
scope.finite_evidence: These negative cycles are finite KL near-equality templates; among the three, the minus-one template has the smallest observed surplus at every audited level.
scope.nonclaim: The audit does not classify negative cycles, identify a critical eigenvector, prove convergence, construct an infinite positive orbit, or disprove the Collatz conjecture.
